features.name: Parking Space Reservation
features.description: Allow customers to reserve available parking spaces

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: All user inputs sanitized against XSS

userStories.title: Reserve available parking space
userStories.iWant: to reserve an available parking space
userStories.soThat: I have guaranteed parking when I need it

acceptanceCriteria.given: A parking space is available for my requested time period
acceptanceCriteria.when: I submit a reservation request with valid dates
acceptanceCriteria.then: The parking spot is successfully reserved
and: Start and end times are stored correctly

acceptanceCriteria.given: A parking space is already reserved for my requested time
acceptanceCriteria.then: An error is thrown with message 'Parking spot is not available'

acceptanceCriteria.given: I provide an end time before start time
acceptanceCriteria.when: I attempt to create a reservation
acceptanceCriteria.then: An error is thrown with message 'End time must be after start time'

businessRules: End time must be after start time
Space must be available for entire requested period
Bookings only allowed within business hours (8 AM - 10 PM)
Total price considers space rate, duration, and customer discounts

userStories.title: Cancel existing reservation
userStories.soThat: I can free up the space if my plans change

acceptanceCriteria.given: I have a confirmed reservation more than 48 hours away
acceptanceCriteria.when: I request to cancel the reservation
acceptanceCriteria.then: The reservation is cancelled with full refund

acceptanceCriteria.given: I have a confirmed reservation 24-48 hours away
acceptanceCriteria.when: I request to cancel the reservation
acceptanceCriteria.then: The reservation is cancelled with 80% refund

acceptanceCriteria.given: I have a confirmed reservation less than 24 hours away
acceptanceCriteria.when: I request to cancel the reservation
acceptanceCriteria.then: The reservation is cancelled with no refund

businessRules: Full refund if cancelled 48+ hours before start
80% refund if cancelled 24-48 hours before start
No refund if cancelled less than 24 hours before start
Only confirmed reservations can be cancelled
